tools_used: CourtListener MCP search and endpoint retrieval
helpful: Provisioned petition and complete brief in opposition exposed both parties' agreement on a hold
CourtListener supplied the lead case's majority and dissent
The statpack provided calibrated certiorari anchors
gaps: The ranged corpus remote was unavailable because its host could not be resolved
The committed statpack did not contain the salience-band table described in the prediction prompt
notes: The case-specific hold signal was much more probative than ordinary certiorari priors. Failed corpus commands returned no priors and emitted no ranged-read statistics.
